divine_spark.note: +1 great person point per campus, holy site and theater square

church_property.note: +2 Gold for each city following this religion

pilgrimage.note: +2 Faith for each foreign city following this religion

religious_unity.note: first conversion of a city-state grants an Envoy

choral_music.note: Shrines and Temples provide Culture equal to Faith

work_ethic.note: Holy Site adjacency also provides Production

feed_the_world.note: Shrines and Temples provide Food and Housing

jesuit_education.note: Campus and Theater buildings may be purchased with Faith

religious_community.note: international routes gain Gold from Holy Site buildings

zen_meditation.note: +1 Amenity in cities with two specialty districts

scripture.note: religious pressure from adjacent cities is stronger

missionary_zeal.note: religious units ignore terrain movement costs

religious_colonization.note: new cities begin with this religion

crusade.note: +10 Combat Strength near foreign cities following this religion

defender_of_the_faith.note: +5 Combat Strength near friendly cities following this religion

dar_e_mehr.note: unlocks the Dar-e Mehr worship building

meeting_house.note: unlocks the Meeting House worship building
